mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.type, a.location, a.description, a.before_attachments AS "beforeAttachments", a.contact, a.contact_number AS "contactNumber", a.status, a.repair_at AS "repairAt", a.after_attachments AS "afterAttachments", a.repair_member_id AS "repairMemberId", a.complete_at AS "completeAt", a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName", member.name AS "repairMemberName", CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN '已提交' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '待确认' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' ELSE '' END AS "statusText" FROM repair a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = a.updated_by LEFT JOIN sys_account member ON member.id = a.repair_member_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
